title: Vikram Aur Betaal
subTitle: King Vikramaditya embarks on a quest to capture the wily corpse of Betal. Betal shares stories with the king, imparting life lessons through cunning questions at each tale's end.

title: Vighnaharta Ganesh
subTitle: Narad asks Ganesh if he is willing to accept defeat when he appears before Tridev. Ganesh refuses to give in and asks his parents, Mahadev and Parvati, for their blessings.
